North.cookingStyle: Heavy use of pressure cooker for dal and rajma. Tawa for roti and paratha. Kadai for sabzi.

South.cookingStyle: Wet grinder essential for idli/dosa batter. Idli pot for steaming. Flat dosa tawa for crepes.

East.cookingStyle: Steaming widely used. Mustard oil in kadai is standard. Earthen pots for slow cooking.

West.cookingStyle: Dhokla steamer for Gujarati snacks. Pressure cooker for dal. Kadai for sabzi.

Central.cookingStyle: Simple cooking with kadai and tawa. Clay pots for traditional preparations.

Northeast.cookingStyle: Steaming and boiling dominant. Minimal oil. Bamboo steamers for traditional dishes.

pressure cooker.safetyNotes: Never open while pressurised. Check valve before each use. Do not fill beyond two-thirds.
pressure cooker.seniorNote: ⚠️ Wait for all steam to release naturally before opening — at least 10 minutes after turning off.
pressure cooker.kidsNote: This needs a grown-up — pressure cookers can be dangerous! 🙋

tawa.safetyNotes: Handle gets extremely hot. Use dry cloth or heat-proof handle cover.
tawa.seniorNote: ⚠️ Use a long spatula and keep your face away from steam when adding water.
tawa.kidsNote: The tawa gets very hot — ask a grown-up to handle it! 🙋

kadai.safetyNotes: Oil can splatter when adding wet ingredients. Tilt pan away from you.
kadai.seniorNote: ⚠️ Add ingredients slowly along the side of the kadai to prevent oil splatter.
kadai.kidsNote: Hot oil splashes — grown-ups only for this step! 🙋

wet grinder.safetyNotes: Do not insert hands while running. Ensure lid is secure.
wet grinder.seniorNote: ⚠️ Ensure the drum is locked before switching on.
wet grinder.kidsNote: Keep fingers away from the grinder — ask a grown-up! 🙋

tandoor.safetyNotes: Extremely high heat. Use long skewers and heat-proof gloves only.
tandoor.seniorNote: ⚠️ Tandoor reaches very high temperatures — use only with assistance.
tandoor.kidsNote: Tandoors are very very hot — only grown-ups! 🙋

gas stove.safetyNotes: Check for gas leaks before lighting. Never leave unattended.
gas stove.seniorNote: ⚠️ Always check that the knob is fully off after cooking.
gas stove.kidsNote: Gas stoves need a grown-up — never touch the knobs alone! 🙋

idli pot.safetyNotes: Steam burns. Use cloth to handle lid. Open away from face.
idli pot.seniorNote: ⚠️ Open the lid slowly and away from you — steam can burn.
idli pot.kidsNote: Hot steam inside — ask a grown-up to open it! 🙋
